scored_papers.title: A Weak Fe K-beta Emission Line in the Broad-Line Radio Galaxy 3C 111 Observed with XRISM
scored_papers.abstract: XRISM/Resolve observation of 3C 111 reveals Fe K-beta weaker than expected, possibly due to blueshifted ionized wind. Outflow velocity 4600 or 17200 km/s depending on Fe XXVI vs Fe XXV identification.
scored_papers.reason: 🛰️ XRISM/Resolve の高分解能で 3C 111 の Fe K-beta が予測より弱 ✨ ionized wind 吸収 (Fe XXVI/XXV) 候補、 outflow 4600 or 17200 km/s 🌪️
scored_papers.summary: 🔬 Resolve heritage の典型 case、 Fe K-alpha/K-beta line ratio anomaly を初検出。 wind kinetic power 10^41-10^44 erg/s 📊

scored_papers.title: Towards precision cosmology with Void x CMB correlations (II): Impact of mock catalogs
scored_papers.abstract: Roman mock catalogs evaluate Void x CMB lensing signal forecasts for Planck/SO/CMB-S4. Analysis of S/N for 2D/3D void definitions, stacking, CMB filtering schemes.
scored_papers.reason: 🌌 Void × CMB lensing を Roman mock で評価、 Planck + SO + CMB-S4 forecast 込み 🛰️ CMB 衛星サイエンスの methodology は LiteBIRD にも隣接 📐
scored_papers.summary: 📈 2D/3D void 定義、 stacking 手法、 CMB filtering の S/N 依存性を mock で系統評価。 SO/CMB-S4 ノイズ水準で Roman の感度予測 🔭

scored_papers.title: Pseudo-Nambu-Goldstone inflation with Z_N symmetric waterfall fields
scored_papers.abstract: Hybrid inflation: PNGB inflaton + N waterfall scalars with Z_N. Coleman-Weinberg analysis, Higgs-portal reheating, multi-component DM possibility.
scored_papers.reason: ⚡ PNGB hybrid inflation の Z_N 対称 waterfall 版、 radiative stability + reheating 解析 🌊 r 予測など観測接続の余地
scored_papers.summary: 🌀 Z_N で quadratic 発散 cancel、 loop-corrected potential 構築。 reheating 温度 < waterfall mass で domain wall 回避 🛡️
